processes.scope: Fixture process for permit guidance that explicitly requires email or staff review outside DevHub.

unsupported_paths.user_visible_reason: Official PP&D guidance says this permit path must be handled by email or manual staff review instead of starting a DevHub draft application.
manual_handoff_recommendations: Do not create or edit a DevHub draft application for this permit path.
Show the user the cited PP&D guidance and prepare a manual handoff checklist for the email or staff-review process.
Ask the user to complete any official email, staff intake, certification, payment, or submission step themselves.

processes.scope: Control fixture for a process that is not marked as an unsupported path.
